# Arg Software

> Arg Software is a Portugal-based software studio building secure, scalable digital platforms for fintech, open payments, music technology, media, and high-growth technology companies. The team is architecture-first, senior-led, and focused on production-ready systems.

## Company

- Website: https://arg.software/
- Full LLM context: https://arg.software/llms-full.txt
- Location: Funchal and Porto, Portugal
- Works with: clients worldwide
- Contact: hello@arg.software
- Project brief: https://5ppw8e4ewzu.typeform.com/to/O5kXHIiC
- Portfolio: https://arg.software/files/portfolio.pdf

## What We Do

- Dedicated product teams for long-term product engineering
- Staff augmentation with senior engineers
- Technical consulting, architecture reviews, modernization, and delivery strategy
- MVP and product delivery for launch-ready software
- AI and automation for product features, integrations, workflows, and internal tools
- Cloud and platform engineering, including CI/CD, observability, deployments, and reliability work

## Industries

- Fintech and open payments
- Financial inclusion and interoperable payment systems
- Music technology and music rights
- Media and entertainment platforms
- Web3 and blockchain infrastructure
- SaaS, internal platforms, and high-growth technology products

## Selected Work

- Mojaloop: https://arg.software/projects/mojaloop/
- People's Clearinghouse: https://arg.software/projects/peoples-clearinghouse/
- Dokutar: https://arg.software/projects/dokutar/
- Sky Tracks: https://arg.software/projects/sky-tracks/
- TV Cine: https://arg.software/projects/tv-cine/
- Royalty Flush: https://arg.software/projects/royalty-flush/
- Vector: https://arg.software/projects/vector/

## Key Pages

- Working with Arg Software: https://arg.software/working-with-us/
- Partners: https://arg.software/partners/

- Privacy policy: https://arg.software/privacy/
- Terms of service: https://arg.software/terms/

## Technical Focus

- Backend systems, APIs, distributed systems, and event-driven architecture
- Frontend and product interfaces with React, Next.js, Angular, Vue, and TypeScript
- Payment switching, ledgers, interoperability, Open Payments, Interledger, and Mojaloop vNext
- Cloud infrastructure, Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD, observability, and production operations
- Databases and data workflows with PostgreSQL, MongoDB, MySQL, Kafka, and related tooling
